summary.zh: 场景生成器工作台,基于 @forgeax/node-runtime 的节点图编程应用。你用节点管线加模板生成完整游戏场景,可复用游戏已有的纹理库,在多层渲染器里预览(支持分层、视图模式、子图层展开),并能截图与对外发布。它把搭场景变成可复用、可批处理的节点图,AI 可经 pipeline 工具批量编排,适合快速产出风格一致的场景。
summary.en: The Scene Generator workbench — a node-graph programming app on @forgeax/node-runtime. You build whole game scenes through a node pipeline plus templates, reuse the game's existing texture library, preview in a layered renderer (layers, view modes, sub-layer expansion), and capture screenshots or publish externally. It turns scene-building into a reusable, batchable node graph; AI can orchestrate via pipeline tools, ideal for quickly producing style-consistent scenes.

body.zh:
节点管线 + 模板生成场景
复用游戏纹理库
body.en:
Node pipeline + templates → scenes
reuse the game's texture library

body.zh: 多层渲染器(分层 / 视图模式 / 子图层)· 截图 · 对外发布
body.en: layered renderer (layers / view modes / sub-layers) · screenshots · publish

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开面板或对话 /compose-scene-pipeline
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the panel or /compose-scene-pipeline

notes.zh: 首版:节点式场景生成器
